document_title: PR24 final determinations: Expenditure allowances — Base cost modelling decision appendix

key_decisions.detail: 6 Water Resource Plus (WRP), 6 Treated Water Distribution (TWD), and 12 combined Wholesale Water (WW) econometric models using random effects panel data 2011-12 to 2023-24

key_decisions.decision: Wastewater network plus base cost models
key_decisions.detail: 3 Sewage Collection (SWC), 2 Sewage Treatment (SWT), and 2 combined Wastewater Network Plus (WWNP) models
4 unit cost models; included historical sludge quality enhancement expenditure (change from draft)
2 bad debt models, 2 other retail cost models, and 4 total retail cost models

key_decisions.decision: EA water quality permit costs excluded
key_decisions.detail: Excluded Environment Agency water quality permit costs from modelled base costs (change from draft)
Random effects estimation over 13 years (2011-12 to 2023-24)

glossary_terms.definition: Panel data econometric estimation method treating company-specific effects as random
Water Resource Plus — water resources and water treatment combined price control
Treated Water Distribution — distribution of treated water price control
Sewage Collection — sewerage network price control component
Sewage Treatment — sewage treatment works price control component
Wastewater Network Plus — combined wastewater network and treatment price control
Transcendental logarithmic functional form — flexible functional form used in some cost models
Log-linear functional form used as alternative to translog in some cost models
